headline: Insiders Are Buying These 3 Energy Stocks
summary: Recently, insiders of several energy companies - Texas Pacific Land, DT Midstream, and CMS Energy - have made splashes, acquiring shares. Given the broader strength across energy in 2026, what do they see?

headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Texas Pacific Land, DT Midstream and CMS Energy
summary: Texas Pacific Land, DT Midstream and CMS Energy see insider buying activity, signaling potential long-term confidence across these energy-focused companies.
